title: salsola corniculata
intro: Salsola corniculata, also known as prickly saltwort, is a perennial plant in the Amaranthaceae family, native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Salsola corniculata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food ingredient, particularly in Mediterranean cuisine.
